hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.tf$' || exit 0; mise exec -- terraform fmt "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.tf$' || exit 0; cd "$(dirname "$f")" && mise exec -- tflint .; } 2>/dev/null || true
